items.title: Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty hints at positive start amid mixed cues; Asian markets extend gains
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: GIFT Nifty was trading at 26,050.5 levels, up by 89 points, indicating a positive start for Indian markets amid mixed global cues

items.title: Buy NTPC, CPSE ETF; Nifty resistance seen at 26,000, says HDFC Securities
items.description: Technical analyst Vinay Rajani of HDFC Securities expects NTPC and CPSEETF to rally to ₹392.50 and ₹111 on the upside, respectively.

items.title: Nifty, Bank Nifty strategy; 3 stocks recommendations today by Motilal Oswal
items.description: Chandan Taparia of Motilal Oswal Financial Services recommends to buy Tata Steel, Bajaj Auto and DMart on February 11, 2026; here's why.

items.title: 'Surprised by market reaction to Kevin Warsh's nomination to the US Fed'
items.description: The dollar, said Aditya Bhave, senior US economist at BofA Global Research, will most likely remain the world's reserve currency.

items.title: Britannia gains 5% post Q3 results; Nomura revives 'top-pick' status
items.description: The buying on the counter came after Britannia released its Q3FY26 numbers on Tuesday, after market hours.

items.title: MSCI Feb rejig: Aditya Birla Capital, L&T Finance added; IRCTC excluded
items.description: According to an official statement, Aditya Birla Capital and L&T Finance will be added to the MSCI Standard Index, while Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) will be removed

items.title: Stocks to Watch today: Apollo Hospitals, Britannia, RIL, BHEL, Tata Motors
items.description: Stocks to watch today, Wednesday, February 11, 2026: Apollo Hospitals Enterprises, Britannia Industries, Bharat Heavy Electricals, Tata Motors shares are likely to be in focus on Wednesday.

items.title: Ashiana Housing zooms 16% on posting Q3 results; PAT up 420% YoY
items.description: In the December quarter, Ashiana Housing reported a 420 per cent rise in consolidated net profit to ₹56.65 crore, compared to ₹10.89 crore a year ago

items.title: Samvardhana Motherson jumps 4% after Q3 beat; brokerages raise target price
items.description: Samvardhana Motherson's share price was trading 4.2 per cent higher at ₹134.85 compared to the previous session's close of ₹129.43 on the NSE

items.title: Fusion Finance shares rally 18% in a month as turnaround gains traction
items.description: Fusion Finance has rallied nearly 18% in a month after returning to profit in Q3FY26. Brokerages cite improving asset quality, lower credit costs and strong capital buffers

items.title: Titan gains 3% on strong Q3 results; market cap nears ₹ 4 trillion
items.description: In the past four trading days, the stock price Titan Company engaged in gems, jewellery and watches business has rallied 7 per cent.

items.title: Eicher Motors shares rise 7% to record high after in-line Q3 results
items.description: The buying on the counter came after Eicher Motors released its Q3FY26 numbers on Tuesday, after market hours.

items.title: Jubilant Foodworks gains 4% as Q3 net jumps 69%; Centrum lifts target price
items.description: Jubilant Foodworks rose as much as 3.7 per cent to ₹575 on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) as the stock reacted to Q3 earnings on Wednesday.

items.title: Tata Motors rallies 4%, hits new high; what's driving CV stock price?
items.description: The stock price of Tata Motors hit a new high of ₹492 in intra-day on Wednesday, and has zoomed 50 per cent from its listing day price of ₹327.65 per share on November 12, 2025.

items.title: Som Distilleries & Breweries tanks 11% on posting weak Q3 results
items.description: In the December quarter, Som Distilleries reported a 27.5 per cent decline in consolidated net profit to ₹7.47 crore, compared to ₹10.31 crore a year ago

items.title: Auto shares in fast lane; Eicher, Lumax, Pricol rally up to 7%; here's why
items.description: At 10:51 AM; the BSE Auto index was the top gainer among sectoral indices, up 2 per cent, as compared to 0.07 per cent rise in the BSE Sensex.

items.title: FIIs pull ₹33,336 cr in Jan 2026, dump defensives, buy metals: PL Capital
items.description: Heavy selling in defensive and consumption-related industries like FMCG, healthcare, and consumer services drove the January outflows

items.title: SBI pips TCS, takes 4th spot in market-cap ranking; stock up 10% in 3 days
items.description: At 11:55 AM on Wednesday; SBI's market cap stood at ₹10.78 trillion, as compared to TCS's market cap of ₹10.68 trillion on the BSE, the exchange data shows.

items.title: BHEL share price tumbles 6% as government announces 5% stake sale via OFS
items.description: Bharat Heavy Electrical share price fell over 6 per cent on Wednesday after the government said it would divesting up to 5 per cent shareholding in the company at ₹254 per share.

items.title: Torrent Power stock falls 6% after Q3 results; announces dividend, NCD plan
items.description: Torrent Power reported a consolidated net profit of ₹655 crore, up 34 per cent year-on-year from ₹490 crore in the year-ago period

items.title: Opec+ supply pause, geopolitical risks tighten outlook for crude: Analyst
items.description: Mirae Asset Sharekhan maintains a constructive short- to medium-term outlook for crude oil, supported by elevated geopolitical risks and Opec+'s decision to hold production at December levels.

items.title: Gold, silver ETFs rebound up to 5% as weak US data raise Fed easing hopes
items.description: Tata Gold ETF led the gains, climbing nearly 5 per cent to an intraday high of ₹15.8. Union Gold ETF rose 3 per cent, while Baroda BNP Paribas Gold ETF, Axis Gold ETF, DSP Gold ETF, Zerodha Gold ETF,

items.title: Hospital stocks: Apollo, Aster DM, HCG, Fortis, Max rally up to 6%
items.description: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise has surged 6 per cent to ₹7,640 after the company's hospitals business maintained a strong profitability in Q3FY26.

items.title: IIFL Capital Services share price drops over 5% after Q3 net profit falls
items.description: IIFL Capital Services share price tumbled in Wednesday's session as the company reported a decline in the net profit for the October-December quarter (Q3FY26)

items.title: SBI pips TCS to become fourth most valued firm amid sharp IT stock slide
items.description: SBI's market capitalisation rose to ₹10.92 trillion after its shares hit a record high, overtaking TCS, whose stock has fallen sharply from its lifetime peak

items.title: Crude oil climbs over 1% as US-Iran risks offset surplus concerns
items.description: Brent crude ​oil futures were up 98 cents, or 1.4 per cent , at $69.78 a barrel ‌by 0949 GMT. US West Texas Intermediate crude rose 95 cents, or nearly 1.5 per cent , to $64.91
